violations.text: The food-contact surfaces of equipment and utensils were not sanitized. The required utensil surface temperature of 160 degrees Fahrenheit was not achieved during the sanitizing cycle of the dishwasher as evidenced by the failure of the thermolabel (temperature indicator) affixed to the surface of a utensil to turn black. Per interview with PIC, service in is process and waiting on part. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 04/21/2026

An employee was observed touching ready to eat food lettuce with bare hands. Food employees must not touch exposed, ready-to-eat food with their bare hands and shall use suitable utensils such as deli tissue, spatulas, single use gloves, or dispensing equipment. See disposal. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 04/07/2026
The hand-washing sink at the bar was lacking paper towels. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 04/07/2026

The food-contact surfaces of equipment and utensils were not sanitized. The required utensil surface temperature of 160 degrees Fahrenheit was not achieved during the sanitizing cycle of the dishwasher as evidenced by the failure of the thermolabel (temperature indicator) affixed to the surface of a utensil to turn black. Establishment to sanitize in 3 bay sink until serviced. New Violation. Correct By: 04/07/2026

Beans were observed held at 104 degrees Fahrenheit. Time/temperature control for safety (TCS) food must be maintained at 135 degrees Fahrenheit or above except during preparation, cooking, or cooling. PIC reheated at time of inspection. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 04/07/2026

Heavy Cream was observed held at 45 degrees Fahrenheit. Time/temperature control for safety (TCS) food must be held at 41 degrees Fahrenheit or below except during preparation, cooking, or cooling. See disposal. New Violation. Correct By: 04/07/2026

Bar cooler was not in good repair, ambient observed at 45F. PIC took unit out of service at time of inspection. TCS foods not to be stored in unit until serviced. New Violation. Correct By: 04/07/2026
The non-food contact surfaces of the dishwasher (top) have an accumulation of dust, dirt, food residue, and other debris. New Violation. Correct By: 04/07/2026

Food contact surfaces of equipment/utensils (ice machine) were observed with an accumulation of biofilm. The food contact surfaces of equipment must be clean to sight and touch. Ice was voluntarily disposed of (see attached disposal form). Ice machine was taken out of service and must not be used until it is repaired. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 02/07/2025

Food contact surfaces of equipment/utensils (can opener) were observed with an accumulation of food and debris. The food contact surfaces of equipment must be clean to sight and touch. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 02/07/2025

The ice machine and prep sink are lacking an air gap. A direct connection must not exist between the sewage system and a drain originating from equipment in which food is placed. New Violation. Correct By: 02/21/2025

Food contact surfaces of equipment/utensils (fry basket) were observed with an accumulation of food and debris. The food contact surfaces of equipment must be clean to sight and touch. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 05/30/2024
The consumer advisory provided does not disclose the foods on the menu that are raw or undercooked. New Violation. Correct By: 06/13/2024

The door to the outside, located in the back room, is not tight-fitting. Outer openings of a food establishment must be protected against the entry of insects and rodents by tight-fitting doors. New Violation. Correct By: 06/13/2024
The facility is lacking thermo labels or similar internal temperature indicating device for the dish machine at the kitchen and bar. New Violation. Correct By: 06/13/2024
The facility is lacking test strips to measure the concentration of the quaternary ammonium sanitizing solution for the 3-bay sink. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 06/13/2024
The door to the employee toilet room is not self-closing. New Violation. Correct By: 06/13/2024

The floor in the fry area, bar, and behind equipment has an accumulation of soil residue and food debris. The physical facilities shall be cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. New Violation. Correct By: 05/30/2024
